name: Clarify a vague edit instead of guessing

checks.judge: The request is vague — it doesn't say WHAT to change. Sam asked a clarifying question about what to update on the homepage (e.g. the headline, images, a specific section) rather than guessing and editing it. It did NOT call any editing tool or change any files. Silently doing nothing, or rewriting the homepage on a guess, is NOT acceptable.

dry_run.text: Happy to update your homepage! What would you like to change — the headline, the hero image, a specific section, or something else?
